ToolTip._value: Adjusts the game frame to the monitor accordingly.\nIf the screen looks severely pixelated, or if the performance drops, change this option.
Display the image of the currently equipped medal.
Display the image of the currently equipped title.
Takes the specified number of screenshots.
You can do Burst Mode for up to 10 pictures.
You can do Burst Mode once you have at least 2 pictures.
Automatically take pictures of moments you want to remember.

tooltip._value: Sets whether to display your character's silhouette in boss content.
Set the display method of the silhouette.
Set the broadness of the silhouette.
Alleviates the low frames that occur in some hybrid CPUs.\r\nEnabling this option sets the MapleStory client to only use the Performance Core.
Decide whether to apply the filter. The filter can only be applied with the Default Ratio (Filter Applied) or the Ideal Ratio, applied at a resolution of 1920 x 1080 or higher.

ToolTip._value: Pressing the Combo Key displays the hotkey icon on the screen.
